items.headline: Claude Code fixes MCP OAuth reliability
items.body: version 2.1.195 ships a targeted fix for MCP OAuth reliability alongside background job stability improvements. ADO MCP Server depends on that OAuth handshake for every Claude-to-Azure request — flakiness there shows up as silent auth failures mid-conversation. worth pulling the update.

items.source_title: What happened after 2,000 people tried to hack my AI assistant
items.headline: Prompt injection harder to land than assumed
items.body: a public challenge threw 6,000 injection attempts at a Claude Opus 4.6 assistant; none extracted the secret phrase. LaborQuest is a public-facing Claude API app where users can type freely — this is evidence the system prompt boundary is sturdier than usually assumed. the caveat: controlled setup, single well-crafted system prompt, not a hardened production deployment.
